instructions: Fill fields per TARGETING.md Part 4. Sources: web search name+town, Google Maps (reviews/closed), sosnc.gov business search + NC license boards (owner), site visit (grade). Leave null if unverifiable. Then run apply-verify.

rows.name: Griffin Brothers
rows.notes: CHAIN/FRANCHISE — Griffin Brothers Tires, Wheels & Auto Repair, a ~10-location Charlotte-area chain. Shelby store at 301 E Marion St, (704) 487-9081 (ex-Dixon Tire, acquired 2008). Chain reportedly sold to an Alabama firm. Web is corporate (griffinbros.com / griffintireandauto.com); review count is a Birdeye aggregate. P12 corporate-controlled web = DROP.

rows.name: Maxwell B. Hamrick Insurance
rows.notes: Independent insurance agency since 1953, 116 N Main St, Boiling Springs (town confirmed). Grew by acquiring local agencies (Dover 1990, Cline/Fallston 1992, Hardin/Spindale 1996). Owned domain mbhamrickins.com but root URL returned 404 on fetch — verify live; possible dead/thin site (= Route A gap angle). Contact fhamrick@mbhamrickins.com (Frank Hamrick). P8 professional.

rows.name: Davis Bors Automotive
rows.notes: Name is 'Davis Brothers Automotive' (not Bors). TOWN CORRECTION — located in LINCOLNTON NC (109 Dave Warlick Dr), not Cherryville. Est. 1975 by Randy & Mike Davis. Phone 704-732-2620. Has owned site davisbrothersauto.net + active FB. P3 auto.

rows.name: Paradise Car Wash
rows.notes: Gastonia confirmed, 205 N Myrtle School Rd (Paradise Car Wash Inc, est. 2005). Owned site paradisecarwash.net (detailing packages). A related 'Paradise Car Wash 2' listing also exists. Gaston County = Tier-3 metro edge, lower local-trust priority.

rows.name: Wilson's Barber Shop
rows.notes: Shelby confirmed, 1017 S Lafayette St, (704) 487-6616. Owner Jim Wilson, 2 employees (BBB file since 2007). Directory/Nextdoor listings only, no owned site. P5 barber, B2.

rows.name: Just Teazn' Hair & Nail Salon
rows.notes: Bostic confirmed, 3460 NC Hwy 226, (828) 248-1130. Directory-only (Yelp/Nextdoor), no owned site or clear active social found (a same-name 'Just Teaz'n' FB salon is in Milford IA — different business). P5 salon.

rows.name: High Country Salon
rows.notes: Bostic confirmed, 2630 Bostic Sunshine Hwy, (828) 245-9090. Social-only — active Instagram @highcountrysalon; Birdeye shows 15 reviews. No owned site. Classic B2 (IG-DM booking). P5 salon.

rows.name: Allen Properties
rows.notes: Shelby, 305 S Dekalb St — real estate / property management (BBB lists under apartments). FB page 'Allen Property' only, no owned site. Listings show phone 704-692-3670 (query gave 704-693-3670 — verify). Owner not confirmed (a Sheila Allen realtor appears in Shelby but link unverified). Note a separate 'Allen Properties in Kings Mountain' listing exists — possible entity confusion.

rows.name: The Wash Tub
rows.notes: Ellenboro confirmed, 504 Main St, (828) 429-5745. Laundromat + self-serve car wash (leans laundromat). Local FB only, no owned site. NOTE: washtub.com is an unrelated national car-wash chain, NOT this business. Low capacity (24hr self-serve).

rows.name: Horn's Tire & Auto
rows.notes: Ellenboro confirmed, 370 Main St ('Horns Tire and Auto Inc'), (828) 453-7444. Strong: ~109 reviews at ~4.8-4.9 (Birdeye). FB only, no owned site (a horns-tire-auto.edan.io page is auto-generated, not owned). High-reviews + no-site = priority combo. P3 auto, B2.

rows.name: Colfax Gin & Coal
rows.notes: DEFUNCT — historic Colfax Cotton Gin (built 1928, operated ~80 yrs then closed). Town of Ellenboro acquired the property; being redeveloped as a public 'Cotton Gin Park.' Not an active, targetable business. DROP.

rows.name: Iron/Ink Tattoos & Piercing
rows.notes: Bostic confirmed, 109 US-74 Business, (828) 247-1017. Owner/artist SunShine McCurry, operating since 1997 (billed as Rutherford County's oldest tattoo parlor, Grade-A health rating). Social-only — FB 'Iron/Ink Tattoos and Body Piercing' + IG @sunshinemccurry. No owned site. Named owner reachable via IG DM.

rows.name: Bostic Motors Inc.
rows.notes: Bostic confirmed, 176 N Main St, (828) 453-7779. President Jeff Aiello. NICHE MISLABEL — listed as a used-car dealer, but the active operation is BMI, a 6.5L diesel-engine remanufacturer/parts shipper (national/intl). Owned site 6-5liter.com (dated, C+, phone-order only, no ecommerce) + eBay store. No local review mass found. Not a typical local-service P3 target.

rows.name: Sara's
rows.notes: Casar confirmed, 5760 Casar Rd, (704) 538-0720. Owner Sara McNeilly. Directory-only (Birdeye 4 reviews). A sarassalon.com / sarassalon.weebly.com exists but appears to be a different 'Sara's' — unverified, treat as no owned site. P5, low capacity.

rows.name: Barbara's House of Beauty
rows.notes: Barbara's House of Beauty & Tanning Center, 4009 Polkville Rd, (704) 538-3416, est. 1987. TOWN NOTE: listed as both Shelby 28150 and Polkville (on Polkville Rd, rural Shelby/Polkville line). Social-only (FB + IG), no owned site. P5 salon.

rows.name: Patterson's
rows.notes: UNFINDABLE after 2 searches — no 'Patterson's' auto business in Earl NC surfaced (Patterson Auto Sales results are Wilmington/Raleigh, unrelated). Earl is a tiny SC-border hamlet; may be a defunct or informal country garage. Left null per lesson (rural + unfindable).

rows.name: Autobell Car Wash
rows.notes: CHAIN/FRANCHISE — Autobell Car Wash, large Charlotte-HQ regional chain (~80 locations across NC/SC/VA/GA). Corporate-controlled web (autobell.com). P12 DROP.

rows.name: Cowan Tire
rows.notes: Forest City location confirmed (247 W Main St, (828) 245-1201); multi-location (also Rutherfordton HQ + Spindale). Owner C. Hunt Cowan, VP Sallie Cowan. CARFAX 4.9/190 reviews. Site cowantire.com runs on Net Driven (tire-industry vendor platform, C+, dated, vendor-locked) = strong 'you don't own your site' Route-A angle. HIGH capacity (longevity, multi-loc, review mass). P3.

rows.name: R-S Service Center
rows.notes: DUPLICATE ENTITY — R-S Speedy Lube & Service Center is ONE business (started as a car wash, now oil-change/auto/inspection/tire), covering OSM rows 19-22 (Service Center / Speedy Lube / Car Wash / Inspections). TOWN CORRECTION: actually in RUTHERFORDTON (841 Railroad Ave, 28139), not Forest City. Owner Chris Robbins. FB only, no owned site. Same findings apply to r-s-speedy-lube-forest-city.

rows.name: R-S Speedy Lube
rows.notes: DUPLICATE of r-s-service-center-forest-city — same single business (R-S Speedy Lube & Service Center, 841 Railroad Ave, Rutherfordton NC 28139, (828) 286-0981, owner Chris Robbins). One of 4 OSM entries for the same shop. TOWN CORRECTION: Rutherfordton, not Forest City. FB only, no owned site.

rows.name: R-S Car Wash
rows.notes: TOWN CORRECTION: Rutherfordton, NOT Forest City (803 Railroad Ave). SAME ENTITY as R-S Service Center / R-S Inspections - one full auto shop offering car wash + oil/lube + inspections + tire. Phone 828-288-6256. 206 reviews/4.8 is the combined shop listing. FB/directories only, no owned site. Auto - LOW-MID capacity. Dedupe with #22.

rows.name: R-S Inspections
rows.notes: TOWN CORRECTION: Rutherfordton, not Forest City. SAME ENTITY as R-S Car Wash / R-S Service Center (803 Railroad Ave, Rutherfordton). Emissions/inspection + tire + car wash. 206 reviews/4.8 shared listing. Dedupe with #21 - treat as one target. Auto - LOW-MID.

rows.name: Broadway Car Wash
rows.notes: Confirmed Forest City (683 S Broadway St). Self-service 24/7 automated/self-serve car wash - LOW capacity, likely no owner or site need. Phone 828-447-9622. FB/directories only.

rows.name: Precision Automotive Specialists
rows.notes: UNCONFIRMED after 2 searches. No Kings Mountain shop found by this exact name; nearest 'Precision Automotive' shops are in Charlotte, Oxford, Bryson City (not KM). Possible small/new KM shop or OSM mislabel - needs a manual Google Maps eyeball before scoring. KM is growth territory so worth a second look.

rows.name: El Acapulco
rows.notes: TOWN CONFIRMED: Shelby (408 N Main St, uptown Shelby favorite) - the Boiling-Springs phone prefix is misleading. 560 reviews/4.5 = strong revenue proxy. Only a Menufy ordering page (el-acapulco.menufyy.com / elacapulco.shop) + FB, no real owned marketing site. P4 restaurant, portfolio-fit HIGH. Good B2/A2 target.

rows.name: Wright's Jewelry
rows.notes: Established 1937, 4911 Fallston Rd. Modern mobile-responsive Shopify e-comm site (B+), no agency credit. 4.9/153 reviews. HIGH capacity (longevity + notability + review mass). Already has a strong owned site = LOW web gap; likely drops below SEND band. Founded by Loy Wright; current owner not surfaced.

rows.name: Fallston Pharmacy
rows.notes: Independent hometown pharmacy since 1986, 5011 Fallston Rd. Spacecrafted template site, dated (~C, 2015-era feel). Pharmacists named: Gary Harrill, John Cannon. Email fallstonstore02@yahoo.com. Strong independent profile + dated vendor site = real A-route 'you don't own/your site is dated' gap. Review count not surfaced.

rows.name: Community Mart
rows.notes: 4904 Fallston Rd (Fallston/Lawndale line). Owner Ray Thomas, phone 704-312-6152 confirmed. Convenience/grocery - likely LOW capacity. FB only. NOTE: a separate 'Community Mart #3' at 1600 Fallston Rd, Shelby is permanently CLOSED (different location, don't confuse).

rows.name: Shiela's Sheds
rows.notes: Shiela's Sheds LLC, 2104 E Dixon Blvd, Shelby (also a Cherryville location). Owner Shiela Ripley. Independent DEALER of Old Hickory Buildings - runs a branded dealer-template site (C+, has 3D builder) - branded dealer, NOT a corporate franchise (owner controls it). Big-ticket outdoor retail. Reviews not surfaced.

rows.name: Bob's Superette

owner.name: Elmore (surname, per Lincoln Times News feature)

rows.notes: 2311 Hwy 27, Lincolnton. Country grocery/convenience + gasoline + vehicle inspections. FB/directories only, no site. Owner surname Elmore (local-news feature 'Elmore credits store's success to employees'); first name not confirmed. Convenience/fuel + small grocery - LOW-MID capacity.

rows.name: Becky's Country Store And Grille
rows.notes: 2259 NC Hwy 226, Bostic. Country store + home-cooking grill/BBQ; Tuesday-night jam sessions; listed on visitncsmalltowns.com. Only FB + an auto-generated edan.io page, no real owned site. Food/P4-adjacent. Review count not surfaced. LOW-MID capacity.

rows.name: Polkville Community Mart
rows.notes: 4006 Polkville Rd, Shelby 28150 (Polkville community, north county). Convenience store + gas/service station. Phone 704-538-5007. FB only. Convenience/fuel - likely LOW capacity.

rows.name: Jerry's Mini Mart & Eateria
rows.notes: TOWN CORRECTION: Polkville (4400 Polkville Rd, Polkville 28136); OSM said Shelby. Convenience store with a full grill/restaurant inside, daily food specials. 4.0 rating (count not surfaced). FB/IG only. Convenience/eatery - LOW-MID capacity.

rows.name: North Carolina State Government Equipment
rows.notes: GOVERNMENT - DISQUALIFY (Stage-1 hard drop). Confirmed = NCDOT Division 12 Equipment Office, 266 Kemper Road, Shelby 28152. A state DOT equipment yard, not a business. Web is ncdot.gov (corporate-controlled). Drop at sourcing.

rows.name: Zumba
rows.notes: NOT A STANDALONE BUSINESS - 'Zumba' is a class, not a company. Phone 828-429-7031 resolves to a fitness facility at 3870 US-64, Rutherfordton that also offers Pilates/cycling/HIIT/BodyPump and has its own app. OSM mislabeled a class as a business - disqualify as artifact. The underlying gym could be a separate P9 lead if its real name surfaces.

rows.name: Chestnut Forge & Furniture at Cherry Mountain Farm
rows.notes: Real artisan business - hand-forged furniture/decor + marketplace on a 50-acre farm (goats/horses/pottery), 3946 US-64 Hwy, Rutherfordton. Owner Craig (craig@chestnutforgeandfurniture.com). Wix site (C+). AGENCY CREDIT in footer 'created by Small Town Soul' - verify redesign date <18mo before treating as Stage-1 disqualifier #3. Largest Case-knife selection in W-NC. High-ticket artisan, interesting. NOTE: site lists phone (954) 410-2892, differs from OSM's 828-755-6563.

rows.name: Mt Vernon Cuppard
rows.notes: SPELLING CORRECTION: actual name is 'Mt Vernon Cubbard' (not Cuppard/Cupboard). 2930 Hudlow Rd, Forest City. Convenience store/gas station with a deli (sandwiches, pizza, chef salads). Phone 828-288-4050 confirmed. FB/directories only. Convenience/fuel - likely LOW capacity.

rows.name: Drop-In Family Market (formerly Sammy's)
rows.notes: 1518 Bostic Sunshine Hwy, Bostic (formerly Sammy's). Grocery/market + deli + gasoline; known for fresh meats and deli. 189 reviews/4.5 = solid revenue proxy. FB only, no real site. Listed on visitncsmalltowns.com. Convenience/grocery + fuel - LOW-MID capacity but strong review mass.

rows.name: DeLoach Gunworks, LLC
rows.notes: Registered LLC, 256 Gun Club Rd, Bostic. Owner Kevin DeLoach. Type 07 FFL/02 SOT + NRA Training Center, ~13 years operating, FFL exp 3/1/2028. Site is GoDaddy Website Builder (C+, dated, 'Powered by GoDaddy' footer). Niche craft/gunsmith. Has a real but weak site = A2/weak-site angle. Reviews not surfaced.

rows.name: Washburn General Store
rows.notes: HIGHLY NOTABLE - NC's oldest continuously operated family business, since 1831; on the National Register of Historic Places (2002 Bostic historic district); featured by WLOS, Our State, OnlyInYourState. Owner Ann Washburn Hutchins (5th generation). Wix site (C+) with online store, many items out-of-stock. AGENCY CREDIT footer 'created by Artifacturing' - verify redesign date before disqualifier #3. HIGH capacity via notability; excellent proof/story piece even if budget is modest. Reviews not shown on site.
